mapper.select: SELECT CMT_ID, POST_ID, MBR_ID, TEXT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM TB_POST_COMMENT_REPLY_HISTORY_DATA WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DTTM ASC
SELECT CMT_ID, POST_ID, MBR_ID, TEXT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM TB_POST_COMMENT_REPLY_HISTORY_DATA WHERE CMT_ID = #{cmtId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POST_COMMENT_REPLY_HISTORY_DATA ( CMT_ID, POST_ID, MBR_ID, TEXT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmtId}, #{postId}, #{mbrId}, #{text}, #{regDttm}, #{regUser}, #{regIp}, #{updDttm}, #{updUser}, #{updIp}, 'N', 'Y' )
